step_by_step_thinking:
Topical steroids are primarily indicated for eczematous dermatitis because they effectively suppress inflammation and immune responses characteristic of such conditions. They work well here compared to dermal atrophy, bullous lesions caused by HSV, or herpes zoster where other interventions might be more suitable given the nature of those pathologies.
\boxed{B} Based on the detailed review of the medical evidence, topical steroids are best suited for treating eczematous dermatitis due to their effectiveness in suppressing inflammation and modulating immune responses specifically seen in such conditions.
